name: accounting firm partners overseeing 5–15 client engagements tool
description: For accounting firm partners processing 5–15 client engagements, missed deadlines cause client dissatisfaction. We provide a compliance tracking application instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
target_audience: accounting firm partners overseeing 5–15 client engagements
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking compliance across multiple client engagements and deadlines.
